twitch_info.title: IWBT Boshy | Trans rectangles all the way down

message.body: HackBackGirl is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: IWBT Boshy | Trans rectangles all the way down
This Friday we're going to be raising money for the Trevor Project! Donations will trigger jumpscares! I hope to see you then!
We're taking a quick ad break. See you in  3 mins! :)

oh, the kraidgeif bug is like, a very common way of beating it btw
you want me to explain why that but happens?

so basically, the fight typically has 3 phases, but in phase one, if you get his hp down low but just not below the threshold of turning over to phase 2, you can do enough damage to skip phase 2, this causes an issue where kraidgeif goes into phase 3 lower than intended and locks himself in a free-kill position
